title: Live with the Flow, Baby
overview: Well-coiffed alien hunter Dandy and his robot sidekick search for a cat-like alien in the premiere of this anime series following the group's search for undiscovered species across the galaxy.

title: The Search for the Phantom Space Ramen, Baby
overview: An alien chef known for making phantom ramen might be the answer to the gang's money problems.

title: Occasionally Even the Deceiver Is Deceived, Baby
overview: Dandy's ship crashes on an unknown planet, where he meets a beautiful young woman. But she is not what she appears.

title: Sometimes You Can't Live with Dying, Baby
overview: Meow is bitten by an alien and turns into a brain-eating zombie.

title: A Merry Companion Is a Wagon in Space, Baby
overview: Dandy embarks on a road trip with an alien girl who traps his consciousness in the body of a stuffed penguin.

title: The War of the Undies and Vests, Baby
overview: Dandy and Meow get stuck on a distant planet and trapped in an endless battle over wearing underwear.

title: A Race in Space Is Dangerous, Baby
overview: Hoping to impress the ladies at Boobies, the Aloha Oe crew enter a galactic grand prix against its glamorous reigning champion Prince, his state-of-the-art robot Z, and his rat-like alien lawyer Squeak.

title: The Lonely Pooch Planet, Baby
overview: Meow gets jealous when Dandy finds a dog on a deserted planet, but when the pooch turns out to be carrying tiny alien stowaways, the crew might never see Boobies again!

title: Plants Are Living Things, Too, Baby
overview: Dandy’s search for a mysterious alien rumored to be living on a distant planet brings him into contact with a race of giant, super intelligent, walking, talking plants!

title: There's Always Tomorrow, Baby
overview: Dandy and the gang get stuck in a time loop.

title: I'm Never Remembering You, Baby
overview: Dandy is lured to the library planet with the promise of free food and booze.

title: Nobody Knows the Chameleon Alien, Baby
overview: Dandy catches an alien that can mimic any creature's appearance. It starts copying Dandy, and then suffers an identity crisis.

title: Even Vacuum Cleaners Fall in Love, Baby
overview: QT falls in love with a coffeemaker, pitting abandoned appliances against their humans.

title: I Can't Be the Only One, Baby
overview: Space Dandy meets himself in other universes.

title: There's Music in the Darkness, Baby
overview: After a big fight with QT and Meow, Dandy is lured to the distant planet of an extremely rare, ukulele-playing alien that wants to turn him into a statue - and steal his smile forever!

title: Slow and Steady Wins the Race, Baby
overview: Thanks to a nifty, handheld teleportation device, Dandy and Meow get mixed up with a fishy little alien whose planet is teetering on the brink of obliteration!

title: The Transfer Student is Dandy, Baby
overview:
It’s a Space Dandy musical, baby, as school’s back in session for Dandy in this ‘80s skewering outing...

“Nobody puts Dandy in the corner.”

title: The Big Fish is Huge, Baby
overview: Dandy and the gang take up fishing in the hopes of capturing an extremely rare alien fish with a massive bounty, but to land this prized catch, they're gonna need a bigger boat!

title: The Gallant Space Gentleman, Baby
overview: When Dr. Gel kidnaps his favorite Boobies girl, Dandy joins forces with a suave and sophisticated alien in a dashing attempt to save the day and collect a big bounty!

title: Rock 'n' Roll Dandy, Baby
overview: Dandy and a new friend decide to start a legendary rock group, but it’s hard to write a hit song when you can stop arguing over band names and t-shirt designs!

title: A World with No Sadness, Baby
overview: When an unfortunate encounter with a dark nebula maroons Dandy on a mysterious planet populated by bizarre beings, the legendary bounty hunter scrambles to find his ticket out of limbo!

title: We're All Fools, So Let's All Dance, Baby
overview: Dandy and his crew head to Planet Grease for a legendary party, only to find themselves walking the streets of a ghost town. Luckily, Dandy’s got the booty that launched a thousand dance parties!

title: Lovers are Trendy, Baby
overview: Dandy’s dead broke, so he agrees to pose as Scarlett’s boyfriend in exchange for some cold hard cash. Does true love stand a chance when you’re paying your date?

title: An Other-Dimensional Tale, Baby
overview: Dandy must confront a painful memory from his past when a four-dimensional ex-girlfriend shows up looking for help avoiding the bounty hunter’s two-dimensional former rival!

title: Dandy's Day in Court, Baby
overview: A seemingly-harmless trip to Boobies ends with Dandy on trial for the murder of a very rare alien. When his friends are called to testify, the situation goes from bad – to worse!

title: The Neverending Dandy, Baby
overview: Dr. Gel finally captures Dandy, which sparks an ultra-destructive space war that could end the universe. Meanwhile, Honey and Scarlet team up with QT and Meow to save their favorite bounty hunter!
